description: Message batches and knowledge notes under a tiny OPENTEAM_ASSEMBLY_BUDGET pool force deterministic degradation of the retrievals and fresh-messages sections.
reproduces: context collapse / token exhaustion (ChatDev, Anthropic; ADR 0023)

arguments.body: first long steering message that must occupy a meaningful slice of a tiny assembly budget
second long steering message stacked behind the first in the same acceptance batch
third long steering message guaranteeing the drained prefix cannot cover the queue

arguments.text: a long note stuffed with enough words that cosine retrieval hits keep competing for a budget that cannot hold them all
